projects.name: GRDN
projects.note: iOS: exit-65 archive fix pushed (commit e27ba73, build 1.11.3+4) — rive_native native library now built on CI before the archive; re-run pending. Web: already live at grdnapp.com. Home-screen redesign delivered — full analysis, an ideal-home-screen spec (one job: start a focus session against today's top task; one bright button; the garden fills the dead space), and a copy-paste Google Stitch prompt. Spec saved to docs/homescreen-redesign.md.
projects.nextStep: Re-run the GRDN Xcode Cloud build to confirm the iOS fix. Home-screen: run the Stitch prompt, pick a design, then Claude can build the redesigned home screen.

projects.name: SCANDALS
projects.note: Moving to a single-photo scan. The separate heel photo is being removed and everything derived from the one top-down shot: widths measured at 10% intervals along the foot until the ankle obscures the heel, then the heel extrapolated from the last clean measurements. A code task is also investigating and improving toe detection so the small toes (3 to 5) are captured and the outline is accurate.
projects.nextStep: Code task in progress: single-photo flow plus toe-detection improvement.

projects.name: HD-LOVE
projects.note: App live end-to-end. Library site, waitlist, App Store screenshots (iPhone + iPad) all shipped; iPad responsive layouts added. Daily 'Today' reading improved (2ac7583, 5a9b287) — the Sun's gate is an honest multi-day 'chapter', 'Today's Focus' recomposes daily from the Sun's line (no more 5-6-day repeats), and the gate span, the Sun's line window and the Moon window all show their real local-time ranges.
projects.nextStep: Finish the App Store submission — the walked-through blockers (Copyright, Content Rights, Privacy Policy URL, data questionnaire), upload the iPhone + iPad screenshots, submit. Ideally from a fresh build that includes the iPad layouts + the daily-reading update.

projects.name: POSTURE

projects.nextStep: Smoke-test the auto-capture flow in Expo Go on your iPhone.

projects.name: Futon
projects.note: Launch-polish work all shipped. Now auditing learning content — Jeremy flagged that N5 only has ~20 modules, no other JLPT levels exist, grammar modules aren't testable, and one module is empty. A code task is auditing the content model, fixing the empty module + grammar-testing gap, and will recommend how to fill out the full curriculum.
projects.nextStep: Content audit in progress. Still pending from before: apply migration 00013 via 'supabase db push'; decide on the Achievements card (real system or remove for v1).

projects.name: PRIMAL
projects.note: On hold by your decision. This is the customer-facing 'Primal Moves' fitness-studio app (front-end built; Firebase + Stripe backend built and pushed). Paused to focus on the separate AI Voice Agent — the sales-agent MVP in the primal-agent repo. Distinct project from this one.

projects.name: AI Voice Agent
projects.note: Feature-complete in mock mode — foundation, dashboard, outbound campaign engine, and an interactive voice test harness all built and verified: typecheck clean, 42/42 tests pass, boots with no API keys. Try it now with 'npm run harness'. Everything buildable without external services is done. Repo: giddyuptiger/primal-agent (commit 96ded86).
projects.nextStep: Two things, both yours: (1) provisioning — Twilio + A2P 10DLC, Deepgram, TTS, Supabase, Resend, Claude key, a host (see docs/PROVISIONING.md; start the A2P registration first, it's the slowest); (2) decide the gym platform (Mindbody/F45) so the real booking adapter can be built.

personal.name: Wedding speech
personal.note: Officiating a friend's wedding in June. Wants the speech drafted this coming week.
personal.nextStep: Send Claude details on the couple — how you know them, their story, tone you want — and Claude will draft the speech.

personal.name: Relationship growth
personal.note: A 21-day structured reflection on your long-term relationship, in five phases, holding three honest outcomes. The program is uploaded and Claude has it.
personal.nextStep: Say the word and Claude starts Day 1 with you, pulling each day's prompts and reflecting alongside you. Continuity kept in one ongoing thread.
